newsitems.title: Y2K destroyed everything in the monster taming survival game MonCraft 199X
newsitems.contents: The "Y2Katastrophe" destroyed civilization in MonCraft 199X, an alternate history monster catching survival game that looks and sounds pretty great. Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/06/y2k-destroyed-everything-in-the-monster-taming-survival-game-moncraft-199x/
